Author: Visual Studio Code
Title: 🧠 Want to give your coding agent new capabilities? Use Agent Skills in #VSCode
Description:
Agent skills let you package instructions and resources into reusable capabilities for your agent. Skills can be loaded on demand and called directly from chat using slash commands like /skill-name.

📌 Learn more: https://aka.ms/VSCode/AgentSkills 📌 Awesome GitHub Copilot: http://aka.ma/AwesomeGC
